title: subscription.disabled data
description: Data payload for the subscription.disabled event, emitted when the platform automatically disables a webhook subscription due to sustained delivery failures.

subscriptionId.description: UUID of the webhook subscription that was disabled.

reason.description: Machine-readable reason the subscription was disabled.

consecutiveFailures.description: Number of consecutive delivery failures that triggered the disable action.

disabledAt.description: UTC timestamp when the subscription was disabled.
